VAL-API-001.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return 202 when triggering pipeline' PASSED — sends POST /api/v1/pipeline/trigger with subscriptionId, asserts HTTP 202, runId present, status=CREATED, message='Pipeline execution started'

VAL-API-002.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return run details when getting pipeline run' PASSED — creates run, adds PLANNER step result, sends GET /api/v1/pipeline/runs/{runId}, asserts HTTP 200, runId, subscriptionId, status, startedAt, steps array with PLANNER step
VAL-API-002.testMethod: should return run details when getting pipeline run

VAL-API-003.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return 202 when resuming failed run' PASSED — creates run with FAILED status, sends POST /api/v1/pipeline/runs/{runId}/resume, asserts HTTP 202, runId present, message='Pipeline execution resumed'
VAL-API-003.testMethod: should return 202 when resuming failed run

VAL-API-004.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return 409 when triggering duplicate run' PASSED — triggers pipeline twice for same subscriptionId, second trigger asserts HTTP 409 with code=PIPELINE_RUN_ALREADY_EXISTS
VAL-API-004.testMethod: should return 409 when triggering duplicate run

VAL-API-005.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return 202 when force triggering existing run' PASSED — triggers pipeline, then triggers again with force=true, asserts HTTP 202 with new runId, status=CREATED
VAL-API-005.testMethod: should return 202 when force triggering existing run

VAL-API-006.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return 404 when getting non-existent run' PASSED — sends GET /api/v1/pipeline/runs/{random-uuid}, asserts HTTP 404 with code=PIPELINE_RUN_NOT_FOUND
VAL-API-006.testMethod: should return 404 when getting non-existent run

VAL-API-007.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT test 'should return 409 when resuming non-failed run' PASSED — creates run in CREATED status, sends POST /api/v1/pipeline/runs/{runId}/resume, asserts HTTP 409 with code=PIPELINE_RUN_NOT_RESUMABLE
VAL-API-007.testMethod: should return 409 when resuming non-failed run
